issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for Airbyte operations.
Uses curl to download docker-compose.yaml without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: stripe-to-bigquery-incremental-connection
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements with complete API calls and environment variable usage, while Response A is incomplete and missing key details.

scenarios.name: custom-internal-api-connector
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides a more complete stream implementation (though missing the source class), whereas Response B has a source but incorrect stream logic and missing required methods.
